stories.headline: Anthropic Set to Close Second $30 Billion Round at $900 Billion-Plus Valuation
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic is closing a second $30B round at $900B+ valuation, surpassing OpenAI to become the most valuable AI startup.

pull_quote.text: We planned for a world of 10x growth per year. In Q1 2026, we saw 80x annualized growth in revenue and usage.

stories.article_excerpt: Three months ago, Anthropic closed a $30 billion Series G that valued the Claude maker at $380 billion. This week, the company is poised

stories.headline: NextEra Energy Acquires Dominion in $67 Billion Merger to Power AI Grid
stories.key_takeaway: The largest utility merger in US history creates a 110 GW power giant for AI data center electricity.

pull_quote.text: Our country is at an inflection point. The demand for electricity is increasing unlike anything we have seen in generations.

stories.headline: JPMorgan Chase Reclassifies AI From Experimental R&D to Core Infrastructure
stories.key_takeaway: JPMorgan reclassified its $2B annual AI investment from discretionary innovation to core infrastructure.

pull_quote.text: The AI spend has already paid for itself, generating approximately $2 billion in operational savings across the firm.

stories.article_excerpt: The world's largest bank has stopped treating artificial intelligence as an experiment. JPMorgan Chase has formally reclassified its

stories.headline: Adobe Canva and CapCut Integrate Google Gemini for Seamless Creative Workflows
stories.key_takeaway: Google turns Gemini into a creative hub by integrating Canva, Adobe, and CapCut.

pull_quote.text: You describe what you want to create. Our creative agent figures out how to get there.

stories.headline: Anthropic Eyes Microsoft Maia 200 Chip as Fifth Silicon Partner
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic negotiates to become the first external customer for Microsoft Maia 200.

pull_quote.text: offers over 30 percent improved tokens per dollar, compared to the latest silicon in our fleet

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic is in early-stage negotiations with Microsoft to run its Claude models on Azure servers powered by the Maia 200

stories.headline: OpenAI Codex Now Controls Mac While Locked Expanding Agent Autonomy
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI Codex operates Mac apps even with the screen locked, the first AI agent with locked-screen desktop control.

pull_quote.text: Locked use is intentionally narrow. It is not a general-purpose remote-unlock path for your Mac.

stories.article_excerpt: Your Mac no longer needs you sitting in front of it for an AI agent to get work done. OpenAI announced that its

stories.headline: Google TurboQuant Achieves 6x KV Cache Compression With Zero Accuracy Loss
stories.key_takeaway: TurboQuant compresses the LLM KV cache to 3-bit precision with zero accuracy loss, 6x memory reduction, 8x speedup on H100s.

pull_quote.text: TurboQuant is more than just a practical engineering solution; it is a fundamental algorithmic contribution backed by strong theoretical proofs.

stories.article_excerpt: The training-free algorithm squeezes LLM key-value caches down to 3 bits per coordinate, delivering up to 8x faster attention on H

stories.headline: Pentagon Tests OpenAI and Google AI Models to Potentially Replace Claude in Defense
stories.key_takeaway: Pentagon tests AI from OpenAI, Google, and xAI to replace Claude after blacklisting Anthropic as supply-chain risk.

pull_quote.text: It is irresponsible to be reliant on any one partner.

stories.article_excerpt: The U.S. Department of Defense is running a live bake-off between frontier AI models from OpenAI, Google, and xAI after blacklisting

stories.headline: Enterprise AI Adoption Hits Wall as 79 Percent of Organizations Face Challenges
stories.key_takeaway: 79% of enterprises face AI challenges despite 97% deploying agents, with only 29% reporting significant ROI.

pull_quote.text: Leaders should enable enterprise value by consciously weaving AI into the fabric of their business workflows.

stories.article_excerpt: Nearly every large company has deployed an AI agent in the past year. Nearly four in five say the process is tearing them apart.

stories.headline: Connecticut Passes One of the Most Comprehensive AI Laws in the Nation
stories.key_takeaway: Connecticut SB5 bundles AI companion safety, employment transparency, and synthetic media rules into a 67-page omnibus.

pull_quote.text: Artificial intelligence is exploding everywhere, with potential for good intertwined with severe risks.

stories.article_excerpt: On May 1, Connecticut lawmakers sent one of the most ambitious state-level AI bills in the country to the Governor's desk.

stories.headline: AI-Generated Deepfake Attack Ads Spread Across Early Voting States
stories.key_takeaway: AI deepfake attack ads have become mainstream in 2026 midterms with at least 15 fabricated candidate videos.

pull_quote.text: The bar for fraud is just so low. Anyone can create whatever they want with AI at this point.

stories.article_excerpt: As South Carolina opens early voting for its state primaries, voters scrolling their phones will encounter something new this cycle

stories.headline: Penn Researchers Introduce Mollifier Layers to Solve Inverse PDEs With Neural Networks
stories.key_takeaway: Penn engineers embedded 1940s mollifier math as a neural network layer to solve inverse PDEs with improved stability.

pull_quote.text: Some scientific challenges require better mathematics, not just more compute.

stories.headline: Medtronic Hugo Surgical Robot Wins FDA Clearance and Completes First US Cases
stories.key_takeaway: Medtronic Hugo breaks Intuitive Surgical two-decade monopoly in a market projected to reach $38-46B by 2035.

pull_quote.text: The future of surgery is not about robotics as a separate modality, it is about technology that enables surgical teams to deliver the best possible care.

stories.article_excerpt: For the first time in more than two decades, a major medtech company has brought a new robotic surgery platform to the US market

stories.headline: Alteryx Unveils Agent Studio Turning Business Analysts Into AI Agent Builders
stories.key_takeaway: Alteryx Agent Studio lets business analysts convert data workflows into autonomous AI agents without coding.

pull_quote.text: It is not IT who owns the logic layer... it is going to be business analysts, Rev Ops people, finance professionals.

stories.headline: Specific AI Unveils Global B2B Workforce Platform at Silicon Valley Startup Grind
stories.key_takeaway: Specific AI positions itself as purpose-built infrastructure for cross-border B2B operations.

pull_quote.text: We are not building a product. We are building the infrastructure layer for cross-border B2B growth.

stories.article_excerpt: A Hong Kong-based startup wants to become the infrastructure layer for international business -- one AI teammate at a time.
